leave_policy: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid leave per year. Requests must be submitted at least 5 days in advance. Unused leave up to 5 days can be carried over to the next year.
salary_policy: Salary reviews occur annually in January. Increments are merit-based and approved by department managers. Off-cycle adjustments require VP approval.
code_of_conduct: All employees must adhere to respectful workplace conduct at all times. Harassment, discrimination, or retaliation of any kind will not be tolerated and may result in termination.
remote_work_policy: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Core hours are 10am-3pm local time. Remote work requests for full weeks require 2 weeks advance notice.
onboarding_policy: New employees receive a 30-day onboarding plan including equipment setup, system access, team introductions, and role-specific training. A buddy is assigned for the first 90 days.
